---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.hero-section}

# Hi, I'm Pablo Rogers 👋

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Professor · Researcher · Data Scientist · Finance & Quantitative Methods
:::

::: {.hero-text}
Welcome to my digital space! 🥳🥰🤩 Here I share information about my professional background, areas of interest, projects, publications, and contact details. In recent years I have worked with Statistical, Computational and **Data Literacy**, focusing on **Reproducible Research** and **Artificial Intelligence**.
:::

[About Me](about.html){.btn-cta .btn-orange}
[View CV](cv.html){.btn-cta .btn-outline}

:::

## Explore {.section-heading}

::: {.section-sub}
Navigate through my work and professional journey.
:::

::: {.nav-cards}

::: {.nav-card}
[🧑‍🏫]{.card-icon}
[About Me]{.card-title}
[Personal background, education, and the story of how I built my academic career.]{.card-desc}

[Read more →](about.html)
:::

::: {.nav-card}
[📄]{.card-icon}
[Curriculum]{.card-title}
[Skills, educational background, and a 20+ year professional timeline.]{.card-desc}

[View CV →](cv.html)
:::

::: {.nav-card}
[📊]{.card-icon}
[Portfolio]{.card-title}
[145+ data analysis projects across business, health, finance, psychology, and more.]{.card-desc}

[See projects →](portfolio.html)
:::

::: {.nav-card}
[📚]{.card-icon}
[Publications]{.card-title}
[Scientific articles on quantitative methods, finance, psychometrics, and open science.]{.card-desc}

[Browse papers →](papers.html)
:::

::: {.nav-card}
[🎬]{.card-icon}
[Psico&Econo_METRIA]{.card-title}
[YouTube channel for scientific production and dissemination on data analysis.]{.card-desc}

[Learn more →](psico.html)
:::

:::

## Recent Publications {.section-heading}

::: {.section-sub}
A selection of my most recent work. [See all →](papers.html)
:::

::: {.highlight-grid}

::: {.highlight-card}
[2025]{.hl-year}
[Best Practices for Your Confirmatory Factor Analysis: A JASP and *lavaan* Tutorial]{.hl-title}
[Behavior Research Methods (2024)]{.hl-journal}
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
[2025]{.hl-year}
[Open Science in Three Acts: Foundations, Practice, and Implementation]{.hl-title}
[Brazilian Administration Review]{.hl-journal}
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
[2025]{.hl-year}
[Financial Well-Being, Health, and Quality of Life: Evidence from Investors]{.hl-title}
[International Journal for Quality Research]{.hl-journal}
:::

:::
